.file-embed.background: rgb(245, 244, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.is-loaded.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.markdown-embed.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(221, 207, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(234, 234, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgb(239, 239, 240) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(239, 239, 240) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(239, 239, 240) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(234, 234, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(234, 234, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(221, 207, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(234, 234, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(236, 223, 232) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
